programme.title: The Late Show With Stephen Colbert
programme.desc: Improv actor and comic Stephen Colbert flexes the hosting muscles he honed over nearly 1,500 episodes of the popular and critically celebrated "The Colbert Report" at the helm of this long-running late-night talk show. Following the genre's classic formula, each show kicks off with a monologue and a look at recent headlines, and features sketch comedy, celebrity interviews and musical performances. Joining Colbert is his bandleader, Julliard-trained Jon Batiste, and house band Stay Human. The show is filmed in New York's famed Ed Sullivan Theater, the longtime home of "The Late Show.".

programme.title: ChangeMakers - Will Travers
programme.desc: Niall McCann talks to Will Travers, conservationist and co-founder of the Born Free Foundation.

programme.title: ChangeMakers - Joyce Poole
programme.desc: Niall McCann talks to elephant biologist Joyce Poole about her career studying elephant communication and a lifetime of research in east Africa.

programme.title: Climate Change - When Skies Ran Dry
programme.desc: Stories from farmers all over the world adaptating to climate change consequencies.

programme.title: ChangeMakers - Jenny Desmond
programme.desc: Niall McCann talks to Jenny Desmond - a conservationist and wildlife activist. Jenny & her husband Jimmy run a sanctuary for rescue Chimpanzees in Liberia, west Africa - they have dedicated their lives to the rehabilitation of humankind's closest relative.

programme.title: Water
programme.desc: Water - Scarcity, Safe Water and Sanitation, Water Pollution, Water related-hazards, Drinking water and wastewater treatment technologies

programme.title: Switch On The Series
programme.desc: Visit the Maasai savannah of Kenya, Africa's largest slum and its newest hydroelectric dam. Journey into the coal mines and power plants of growing Vietnam. Cross Nepal with an environmental health scientist, studying people's transition from the most dangerous cooking fuel, killing millions a year, to the safest. And bring solar electricity, for the first time ever, to the Arhuaco people of Northern Colombia. Watch this 7-part series, based on and expanded from the celebrated global energy documentary Switch On– a spectacular, unexpected journey to know and understand the issues driving energy development around the world.

programme.title: Alvelal, Una Historia Real
programme.desc: With optimism and determination, the voices of farmers and AlVelAl entrepreneurs show us practical and realistic solutions to combat desertification and the loss of life that affects so many rural areas around the world. It is the story of entrepreneurs for the environmental, economic and social regeneration of their territory, the Altiplano Estepario of Almeria, Granada and Murcia. More information at https://www.headheartandhands.site

programme.title: People on Earth
programme.desc: People on Earth - Overpopulation, Inequalities within and among countries, Poverty, Hunger, Health, Gender equality

programme.title: Detroit Hives
programme.desc: Detroit Hives follows Tim Paule and Nicole Lindsey, a young couple from East Detroit, who are working hard to bring diversity to the field of beekeeping and create opportunities for young Detroit natives to overcome adversity. It is estimated that Detroit has well over 90,000 empty housing lots to date. In an effort to address this issue, Tim and Nicole have been purchasing vacant lots and converting them into bee farms. Detroit Hives explores the importance of bringing diversity to beekeeping and rebuilding inner-city communities one hive at a time.

programme.title: Sustainable Living
programme.desc: Sustainable Living - Green consumerism, Recycling - Reusing - Composting, Green Building, Ecotourism, Eco-friendly Choices

programme.title: Sara Aapi
programme.desc: Sara Aapi is the story of a woman who sacrificed her dreams and the most precious years of her youth to give her three brothers the best upbringing. After the sudden death of her parents, Sara takes control of both the family and the business. She turns them into success stories, but at the cost of her own personal life. Her world revolves around her brothers, Burhan, Adnan, and Usman. Over time, Sara becomes strict and commanding. Her decisions become law inside the house. But her strongest test begins when her brothers’ personal desires rise against her authority. Soon, tensions grow and loyalties are tested. Will Sara choose her authority over her family? Will Sara’s brothers rebel against her decisions? Can Sara keep her family together? 7th Sky Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Shaidai
programme.desc: Shaidai is a celebration of love, a story that dares to ask what happens when the most beautiful feeling in the world turns into its greatest test. Ali Khan stands at the peak of the world others only dream of. Driven, relentless, and accustomed to getting what he wants, yet beneath that iron exterior lives a quietly devoted grandson. Miral is a self made girl who wants to do everything on her own. Vivid, sharp tongued, and fiercely certain of her own path, she moves through life with a conviction that refuses to be dimmed. Fate, indifferent to logic and timing, brings their names together. But love, it seems, has made enemies before they even knew it existed. From the shadows, forces driven by old grievances and hidden motives begin to close in, testing not just their bond but everything they believe in. What storms lie ahead in Ali and Miral’s love? Can two people who found each other against all odds hold on when the odds turn against them? And when love is pushed to its breaking point, who will be left standing? 7th Sky Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Rang De
programme.desc: This is the story of Dua, a lively and strong young girl who lives with her mother, Nudrat, and her grandmother, Noor Bahar. After losing her father at a young age, Dua grows up watching her mother struggle as a widow. She becomes her mother’s strength, working alongside Nudrat and Noor Bahar while also running her own vlogging channel. Life is not easy, but Dua faces it with courage. Then she makes a decision that shakes everyone around her. Dua wants her mother to marry again. In a society where such choices are questioned, her bold step brings whispers, judgment, and resistance. At the same time, Ahad, a young man who runs an antique shop with his mother Samina, crosses paths with Dua. Their families are already connected through work, but their meeting soon becomes something more personal. Before Dua and Ahad realize it, they begin to fall for each other, but circumstances take an unexpected turn. Will Dua be able to face society’s judgment for getting her mother married again? Will Dua and Ahad complete their love story? By choosing happiness for her mother, is Dua unknowingly changing her own life forever? 7th Sky Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Khush Naseebi
programme.desc: Khush Naseebi is a heartfelt story of Siraj Qasmi and his three daughters, Narmeen, Maheen, and Emaan. Siraj Qasmi is a widower who loves his daughters deeply. Narmeen and Maheen are the light of his life, but his heart remains distant from his youngest, Emaan. He carries a silent belief that her birth took away his wife, and that shadow has never left their relationship. In the same neighborhood lives Humayun, a hardworking tailor and Siraj’s favorite. He quietly loves Narmeen, but keeps his feelings hidden, believing he is not worthy of her. Like every father, Siraj dreams of seeing his daughters happily married. But before he can fulfill this wish, destiny knocks on his door. What does fate have in store for Siraj Qasmi? Will Humayun finally confess his love to Narmeen? And will Narmeen ever realize how deeply he loves her? Geo Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Hasna Mana Hai
programme.desc: There is a locality in the old city of Lahore where a young man (Host: Tabish Hashmi) has come to reside from Karachi. He is the guy who has reside in Canada too, so there is a double introduction with his name. This locality is basically a pulse of society in that almost all the segments are presents. The young man (Host) tries to understand the eccentric behavior of the people around and in doing so inadvertently offers himself to mock at. The host brings to light the fact that the morals are customs more preached than practiced while traditions are customs more practiced than preached. Gradually the host will lay bare the sensibility, psyche and sensitivity of different characters thus giving the viewers insight into the show storyline. The viewers come to know of perplexing paradoxes in the funniest way possible. In every new episode the locality is entrapped into a tricky situation which they are struggling to come out of employing street smart tactics. Notwithstanding with the fact that they condemn every other person, institution, norm and policy of the government but they exactly do contrarily to what they profess. The issues of the community revolve around small scale corruption, partisanship, political misadventures, jealousy, interference, snobbery, belittling others. They keep taunting one another using tongue in cheek remarks thus manifesting a past perennially plagued with street power struggle, political affiliation, and proclivity for easy money and predisposition to the influence. There are two different strands lurking parallel to each other in the show. The host has to entertain the audience by introducing them to socio-political anecdotes, guests, short skits, weird people, achievers, trivial but tantalizing smaller wins, social eccentricity, literary uniqueness, cultural exclusivity, musical performance, parodying, stand up comedy etc and still the other strand runs on the floor as the main subject of the show - the drama being played out by the permanent characters of the show. These permanent characters are Pehalwan, Policeman, Professor, Pehalwan's daughter, a wannabe actress, a foreign returned Pakistani, Pehalwan's wife, a shop keeper, a poet, a fatman (an idle youth), a girl singer. The show will be divided into different segments but this segmentation is not conventional. The segments will only be announced in terms of the introduction of characters or performance if need be. Usually the characters will come on their own giving an impression as if they are unwanted though the host is quite familiar with them and poses as if their forced entry is not highly welcomed.

programme.title: Ehraam-e-junoon
programme.desc: "Ehraam-e-Junoon" follows the story of a young and immensely beautiful girl named Shanzay, who is filled with pride and stubbornness due to her upper-class upbringing. Shanzay believes that money can buy everything, including happiness. Despite her high standards, Shanzay is yet to find a man who can impress her until she meets Shayan at an event. Shayan is a handsome young man from a middle-class family, who takes up a job as a pizza delivery boy to make ends meet. Shanzay who is immediately drawn to Shayan wants to provide him with a better lifestyle however, Shayan keeps his distance and refuses to accept any of Shanzay’s advances. As the story unfolds, Shanzay and Shayan's paths cross again and again, and Shanzay begins to question her beliefs about love and money. Will Shayan be the one to break through Shanzay's walls of pride and stubbornness, or will she continue to chase after superficial things? The drama serial "Ehraam-e-Junoon" promises to take viewers on a rollercoaster ride of emotions as it explores the themes of love, pride, and class differences.

programme.title: Humrahi
programme.desc: What begins as a series of light-hearted yet unpleasant encounters between Sayhaan and Elif eventually blossoms into an unexpected and deep-rooted love. Just as they begin to find their footing together, the life of Sayhaan Ghazi is suddenly upended by a storm he did not create. When an unforeseen crisis strikes, the two pillars of his existence—his devoted love, Elif, and his formidable father—are forced to face an impossible ultimatum. Driven by a desperate, protective instinct, they make a difficult choice to shield him from a reality they believe would be his undoing. However, this well-intentioned sacrifice triggers a catastrophic chain of events, turning their home into a place of chilling distance and lifelong regret. It is a haunting exploration of how the choices made for those we love can ultimately become the very walls that permanently divide a family. Will Sayhaan’s journey forward be defined by the choices others made, or will he find a way to reclaim his own destiny? What does life look like for Elif and Sayhaan’s father when the person they tried to protect can no longer look them in the eye? Director &

programme.desc: Khush Naseebi is a heartfelt story of Siraj Qasmi and his three daughters, Narmeen, Maheen, and Emaan. Siraj Qasmi is a widower who loves his daughters deeply. Narmeen and Maheen are the light of his life, but his heart remains distant from his youngest, Emaan. He carries a silent belief that her birth took away his wife, and that shadow has never left their relationship. In the same neighborhood lives Humayun, a hardworking tailor and Siraj’s favorite. He quietly loves Narmeen, but keeps his feelings hidden, believing he is not worthy of her. Like every father, Siraj dreams of seeing his daughters happily married. But before he can fulfill this wish, destiny knocks on his door. What does fate have in store for Siraj Qasmi? Will Humayun finally confess his love to Narmeen? And will Narmeen ever realize how deeply he loves her? Geo Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Shaidai
programme.desc: Shaidai is a celebration of love, a story that dares to ask what happens when the most beautiful feeling in the world turns into its greatest test. Ali Khan stands at the peak of the world others only dream of. Driven, relentless, and accustomed to getting what he wants, yet beneath that iron exterior lives a quietly devoted grandson. Miral is a self made girl who wants to do everything on her own. Vivid, sharp tongued, and fiercely certain of her own path, she moves through life with a conviction that refuses to be dimmed. Fate, indifferent to logic and timing, brings their names together. But love, it seems, has made enemies before they even knew it existed. From the shadows, forces driven by old grievances and hidden motives begin to close in, testing not just their bond but everything they believe in. What storms lie ahead in Ali and Miral’s love? Can two people who found each other against all odds hold on when the odds turn against them? And when love is pushed to its breaking point, who will be left standing? 7th Sky Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Rang De
programme.desc: This is the story of Dua, a lively and strong young girl who lives with her mother, Nudrat, and her grandmother, Noor Bahar. After losing her father at a young age, Dua grows up watching her mother struggle as a widow. She becomes her mother’s strength, working alongside Nudrat and Noor Bahar while also running her own vlogging channel. Life is not easy, but Dua faces it with courage. Then she makes a decision that shakes everyone around her. Dua wants her mother to marry again. In a society where such choices are questioned, her bold step brings whispers, judgment, and resistance. At the same time, Ahad, a young man who runs an antique shop with his mother Samina, crosses paths with Dua. Their families are already connected through work, but their meeting soon becomes something more personal. Before Dua and Ahad realize it, they begin to fall for each other, but circumstances take an unexpected turn. Will Dua be able to face society’s judgment for getting her mother married again? Will Dua and Ahad complete their love story? By choosing happiness for her mother, is Dua unknowingly changing her own life forever? 7th Sky Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Hasna Mana Hai
programme.desc: There is a locality in the old city of Lahore where a young man (Host: Tabish Hashmi) has come to reside from Karachi. He is the guy who has reside in Canada too, so there is a double introduction with his name. This locality is basically a pulse of society in that almost all the segments are presents. The young man (Host) tries to understand the eccentric behavior of the people around and in doing so inadvertently offers himself to mock at. The host brings to light the fact that the morals are customs more preached than practiced while traditions are customs more practiced than preached. Gradually the host will lay bare the sensibility, psyche and sensitivity of different characters thus giving the viewers insight into the show storyline. The viewers come to know of perplexing paradoxes in the funniest way possible. In every new episode the locality is entrapped into a tricky situation which they are struggling to come out of employing street smart tactics. Notwithstanding with the fact that they condemn every other person, institution, norm and policy of the government but they exactly do contrarily to what they profess. The issues of the community revolve around small scale corruption, partisanship, political misadventures, jealousy, interference, snobbery, belittling others. They keep taunting one another using tongue in cheek remarks thus manifesting a past perennially plagued with street power struggle, political affiliation, and proclivity for easy money and predisposition to the influence. There are two different strands lurking parallel to each other in the show. The host has to entertain the audience by introducing them to socio-political anecdotes, guests, short skits, weird people, achievers, trivial but tantalizing smaller wins, social eccentricity, literary uniqueness, cultural exclusivity, musical performance, parodying, stand up comedy etc and still the other strand runs on the floor as the main subject of the show - the drama being played out by the permanent characters of the show. These permanent characters are Pehalwan, Policeman, Professor, Pehalwan's daughter, a wannabe actress, a foreign returned Pakistani, Pehalwan's wife, a shop keeper, a poet, a fatman (an idle youth), a girl singer. The show will be divided into different segments but this segmentation is not conventional. The segments will only be announced in terms of the introduction of characters or performance if need be. Usually the characters will come on their own giving an impression as if they are unwanted though the host is quite familiar with them and poses as if their forced entry is not highly welcomed.

programme.title: Case No.9
programme.desc: Case No 9 is an inspiring story of Sehar, a courageous and ambitious young woman who challenges societal norms and becomes a beacon of resistance for others. Sehar, confident and driven, joins the company of Kamran, a domineering businessman feared by everyone for his egoistic and controlling nature. Unlike others, Sehar refuses to conform, letting her talent and integrity shine. Sehar’s defiance unsettles Kamran, who sets out to teach her a lesson. What follows is Sehar’s journey of redemption and resilience as she navigates the challenges thrown her way. Will Kamran succeed in teaching Sehar a lesson, or will she rise above his schemes? Can Sehar find the strength and support to overcome the odds, or will Kamran’s wealth and influence prove insurmountable? Geo and 7th Sky Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Humrahi
programme.desc: What begins as a series of light-hearted yet unpleasant encounters between Sayhaan and Elif eventually blossoms into an unexpected and deep-rooted love. Just as they begin to find their footing together, the life of Sayhaan Ghazi is suddenly upended by a storm he did not create. When an unforeseen crisis strikes, the two pillars of his existence—his devoted love, Elif, and his formidable father—are forced to face an impossible ultimatum. Driven by a desperate, protective instinct, they make a difficult choice to shield him from a reality they believe would be his undoing. However, this well-intentioned sacrifice triggers a catastrophic chain of events, turning their home into a place of chilling distance and lifelong regret. It is a haunting exploration of how the choices made for those we love can ultimately become the very walls that permanently divide a family. Will Sayhaan’s journey forward be defined by the choices others made, or will he find a way to reclaim his own destiny? What does life look like for Elif and Sayhaan’s father when the person they tried to protect can no longer look them in the eye? Director &

programme.title: Sara Aapi
programme.desc: Sara Aapi is the story of a woman who sacrificed her dreams and the most precious years of her youth to give her three brothers the best upbringing. After the sudden death of her parents, Sara takes control of both the family and the business. She turns them into success stories, but at the cost of her own personal life. Her world revolves around her brothers, Burhan, Adnan, and Usman. Over time, Sara becomes strict and commanding. Her decisions become law inside the house. But her strongest test begins when her brothers’ personal desires rise against her authority. Soon, tensions grow and loyalties are tested. Will Sara choose her authority over her family? Will Sara’s brothers rebel against her decisions? Can Sara keep her family together? 7th Sky Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Ehraam-e-Junoon
programme.desc: "Ehraam-e-Junoon" follows the story of a young and immensely beautiful girl named Shanzay, who is filled with pride and stubbornness due to her upper-class upbringing. Shanzay believes that money can buy everything, including happiness. Despite her high standards, Shanzay is yet to find a man who can impress her until she meets Shayan at an event. Shayan is a handsome young man from a middle-class family, who takes up a job as a pizza delivery boy to make ends meet. Shanzay who is immediately drawn to Shayan wants to provide him with a better lifestyle however, Shayan keeps his distance and refuses to accept any of Shanzay’s advances. As the story unfolds, Shanzay and Shayan's paths cross again and again, and Shanzay begins to question her beliefs about love and money. Will Shayan be the one to break through Shanzay's walls of pride and stubbornness, or will she continue to chase after superficial things? The drama serial "Ehraam-e-Junoon" promises to take viewers on a rollercoaster ride of emotions as it explores the themes of love, pride, and class differences.

programme.title: Pehli Barish
programme.desc: Pehli Barish is a story of love that spans generations, a tale of joy, longing, and heartbreak that seems to repeat itself. Years ago in Lahore, strangers Behzad and Maleeha met and a spark of love lit between them. But fate had other plans and tore them apart, leaving hearts scarred. Decades later, Behzad lives a settled life with a family, yet the past never truly leaves him. His son, Maani, falls for Nimra and the shadows of old heartbreak loom large. As Behzad watches history threatening to repeat itself, he must face his own past to protect Maani and perhaps confront the love he lost long ago. Will Maleeha return to Behzad’s life? Will Behzad save his son from the same heartbreak he experienced? Can Maani and Nimra’s love win against all odds? GEO & 7th Sky Entertainment presentation

Notwithstanding with the fact that they condemn every other person, institution, norm and policy of the government but they exactly do contrarily to what they profess. The issues of the community revolve around small scale corruption, partisanship, political misadventures, jealousy, interference, snobbery, belittling others. They keep taunting one another using tongue in cheek remarks thus manifesting a past perennially plagued with street power struggle, political affiliation, and proclivity for easy money and predisposition to the influence. There are two different strands lurking parallel to each other in the show. The host has to entertain the audience by introducing them to socio-political anecdotes, guests, short skits, weird people, achievers, trivial but tantalizing smaller wins, social eccentricity, literary uniqueness, cultural exclusivity, musical performance, parodying, stand up comedy etc and still the other strand runs on the floor as the main subject of the show - the drama being played out by the permanent characters of the show. These permanent characters are Pehalwan, Policeman, Professor, Pehalwan's daughter, a wannabe actress, a foreign returned Pakistani, Pehalwan's wife, a shop keeper, a poet, a fatman (an idle youth), a girl singer. The show will be divided into different segments but this segmentation is not conventional. The segments will only be announced in terms of the introduction of characters or performance if need be. Usually the characters will come on their own giving an impression as if they are unwanted though the host is quite familiar with them and poses as if their forced entry is not highly welcomed.

programme.title: Case No.9
programme.desc: Case No 9 is an inspiring story of Sehar, a courageous and ambitious young woman who challenges societal norms and becomes a beacon of resistance for others. Sehar, confident and driven, joins the company of Kamran, a domineering businessman feared by everyone for his egoistic and controlling nature. Unlike others, Sehar refuses to conform, letting her talent and integrity shine. Sehar’s defiance unsettles Kamran, who sets out to teach her a lesson. What follows is Sehar’s journey of redemption and resilience as she navigates the challenges thrown her way. Will Kamran succeed in teaching Sehar a lesson, or will she rise above his schemes? Can Sehar find the strength and support to overcome the odds, or will Kamran’s wealth and influence prove insurmountable? Geo and 7th Sky Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Shaidai
programme.desc: Shaidai is a celebration of love, a story that dares to ask what happens when the most beautiful feeling in the world turns into its greatest test. Ali Khan stands at the peak of the world others only dream of. Driven, relentless, and accustomed to getting what he wants, yet beneath that iron exterior lives a quietly devoted grandson. Miral is a self made girl who wants to do everything on her own. Vivid, sharp tongued, and fiercely certain of her own path, she moves through life with a conviction that refuses to be dimmed. Fate, indifferent to logic and timing, brings their names together. But love, it seems, has made enemies before they even knew it existed. From the shadows, forces driven by old grievances and hidden motives begin to close in, testing not just their bond but everything they believe in. What storms lie ahead in Ali and Miral’s love? Can two people who found each other against all odds hold on when the odds turn against them? And when love is pushed to its breaking point, who will be left standing? 7th Sky Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Humrahi
programme.desc: What begins as a series of light-hearted yet unpleasant encounters between Sayhaan and Elif eventually blossoms into an unexpected and deep-rooted love. Just as they begin to find their footing together, the life of Sayhaan Ghazi is suddenly upended by a storm he did not create. When an unforeseen crisis strikes, the two pillars of his existence—his devoted love, Elif, and his formidable father—are forced to face an impossible ultimatum. Driven by a desperate, protective instinct, they make a difficult choice to shield him from a reality they believe would be his undoing. However, this well-intentioned sacrifice triggers a catastrophic chain of events, turning their home into a place of chilling distance and lifelong regret. It is a haunting exploration of how the choices made for those we love can ultimately become the very walls that permanently divide a family. Will Sayhaan’s journey forward be defined by the choices others made, or will he find a way to reclaim his own destiny? What does life look like for Elif and Sayhaan’s father when the person they tried to protect can no longer look them in the eye? Director &

programme.title: Rang De
programme.desc: This is the story of Dua, a lively and strong young girl who lives with her mother, Nudrat, and her grandmother, Noor Bahar. After losing her father at a young age, Dua grows up watching her mother struggle as a widow. She becomes her mother’s strength, working alongside Nudrat and Noor Bahar while also running her own vlogging channel. Life is not easy, but Dua faces it with courage. Then she makes a decision that shakes everyone around her. Dua wants her mother to marry again. In a society where such choices are questioned, her bold step brings whispers, judgment, and resistance. At the same time, Ahad, a young man who runs an antique shop with his mother Samina, crosses paths with Dua. Their families are already connected through work, but their meeting soon becomes something more personal. Before Dua and Ahad realize it, they begin to fall for each other, but circumstances take an unexpected turn. Will Dua be able to face society’s judgment for getting her mother married again? Will Dua and Ahad complete their love story? By choosing happiness for her mother, is Dua unknowingly changing her own life forever? 7th Sky Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Khush Naseebi
programme.desc: Khush Naseebi is a heartfelt story of Siraj Qasmi and his three daughters, Narmeen, Maheen, and Emaan. Siraj Qasmi is a widower who loves his daughters deeply. Narmeen and Maheen are the light of his life, but his heart remains distant from his youngest, Emaan. He carries a silent belief that her birth took away his wife, and that shadow has never left their relationship. In the same neighborhood lives Humayun, a hardworking tailor and Siraj’s favorite. He quietly loves Narmeen, but keeps his feelings hidden, believing he is not worthy of her. Like every father, Siraj dreams of seeing his daughters happily married. But before he can fulfill this wish, destiny knocks on his door. What does fate have in store for Siraj Qasmi? Will Humayun finally confess his love to Narmeen? And will Narmeen ever realize how deeply he loves her? Geo Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Hasna Mana Hai
programme.desc: There is a locality in the old city of Lahore where a young man (Host: Tabish Hashmi) has come to reside from Karachi. He is the guy who has reside in Canada too, so there is a double introduction with his name. This locality is basically a pulse of society in that almost all the segments are presents. The young man (Host) tries to understand the eccentric behavior of the people around and in doing so inadvertently offers himself to mock at. The host brings to light the fact that the morals are customs more preached than practiced while traditions are customs more practiced than preached. Gradually the host will lay bare the sensibility, psyche and sensitivity of different characters thus giving the viewers insight into the show storyline. The viewers come to know of perplexing paradoxes in the funniest way possible. There are two different strands lurking parallel to each other in the show. The host has to entertain the audience by introducing them to socio-political anecdotes, guests, short skits, weird people, achievers, trivial but tantalizing smaller wins, social eccentricity, literary uniqueness, cultural exclusivity, musical performance, parodying, stand up comedy etc and still the other strand runs on the floor as the main subject of the show - the drama being played out by the permanent characters of the show. These permanent characters are Pehalwan, Policeman, Professor, Pehalwan's daughter, a wannabe actress, a foreign returned Pakistani, Pehalwan's wife, a shop keeper, a poet, a fatman (an idle youth), a girl singer. programme.title: Ehraam-e-Junoon
programme.desc: "Ehraam-e-Junoon" follows the story of a young and immensely beautiful girl named Shanzay, who is filled with pride and stubbornness due to her upper-class upbringing. Shanzay believes that money can buy everything, including happiness. Despite her high standards, Shanzay is yet to find a man who can impress her until she meets Shayan at an event. Shayan is a handsome young man from a middle-class family, who takes up a job as a pizza delivery boy to make ends meet. Shanzay who is immediately drawn to Shayan wants to provide him with a better lifestyle however, Shayan keeps his distance and refuses to accept any of Shanzay’s advances. As the story unfolds, Shanzay and Shayan's paths cross again and again, and Shanzay begins to question her beliefs about love and money. Will Shayan be the one to break through Shanzay's walls of pride and stubbornness, or will she continue to chase after superficial things? The drama serial "Ehraam-e-Junoon" promises to take viewers on a rollercoaster ride of emotions as it explores the themes of love, pride, and class differences.

programme.title: Pehli Barish
programme.desc: Pehli Barish is a story of love that spans generations, a tale of joy, longing, and heartbreak that seems to repeat itself. Years ago in Lahore, strangers Behzad and Maleeha met and a spark of love lit between them. But fate had other plans and tore them apart, leaving hearts scarred. Decades later, Behzad lives a settled life with a family, yet the past never truly leaves him. His son, Maani, falls for Nimra and the shadows of old heartbreak loom large. As Behzad watches history threatening to repeat itself, he must face his own past to protect Maani and perhaps confront the love he lost long ago. Will Maleeha return to Behzad’s life? Will Behzad save his son from the same heartbreak he experienced? Can Maani and Nimra’s love win against all odds? GEO & 7th Sky Entertainment presentation

programme.title: Hasna Mana Hai
programme.desc: There is a locality in the old city of Lahore where a young man (Host: Tabish Hashmi) has come to reside from Karachi. He is the guy who has reside in Canada too, so there is a double introduction with his name. This locality is basically a pulse of society in that almost all the segments are presents. The young man (Host) tries to understand the eccentric behavior of the people around and in doing so inadvertently offers himself to mock at. The host brings to light the fact that the morals are customs more preached than practiced while traditions are customs more practiced than preached. Gradually the host will lay bare the sensibility, psyche and sensitivity of different characters thus giving the viewers insight into the show storyline. The viewers come to know of perplexing paradoxes in the funniest way possible. In every new episode the locality is entrapped into a tricky situation which they are struggling to come out of employing street smart tactics. Notwithstanding with the fact that they condemn every other person, institution, norm and policy of the government but they exactly do contrarily to what they profess. The issues of the community revolve around small scale corruption, partisanship, political misadventures, jealousy, interference, snobbery, belittling others. They keep taunting one another using tongue in cheek remarks thus manifesting a past perennially plagued with street power struggle, political affiliation, and proclivity for easy money and predisposition to the influence. There are two different strands lurking parallel to each other in the show. The host has to entertain the audience by introducing them to socio-political anecdotes, guests, short skits, weird people, achievers, trivial but tantalizing smaller wins, social eccentricity, literary uniqueness, cultural exclusivity, musical performance, parodying, stand up comedy etc and still the other strand runs on the floor as the main subject of the show - the drama being played out by the permanent characters of the show. These permanent characters are Pehalwan, Policeman, Professor, Pehalwan's daughter, a wannabe actress, a foreign returned Pakistani, Pehalwan's wife, a shop keeper, a poet, a fatman (an idle youth), a girl singer. The show will be divided into different segments but this segmentation is not conventional. The segments will only be announced in terms of the introduction of characters or performance if need be. Usually the characters will come on their own giving an impression as if they are unwanted though the host is quite familiar with them and poses as if their forced entry is not highly welcomed.

programme.title: Pehli Barish
programme.desc: Pehli Barish is a story of love that spans generations, a tale of joy, longing, and heartbreak that seems to repeat itself. Years ago in Lahore, strangers Behzad and Maleeha met and a spark of love lit between them. But fate had other plans and tore them apart, leaving hearts scarred. Decades later, Behzad lives a settled life with a family, yet the past never truly leaves him. His son, Maani, falls for Nimra and the shadows of old heartbreak loom large. As Behzad watches history threatening to repeat itself, he must face his own past to protect Maani and perhaps confront the love he lost long ago. Will Maleeha return to Behzad’s life? Will Behzad save his son from the same heartbreak he experienced? Can Maani and Nimra’s love win against all odds? GEO & 7th Sky Entertainment presentation

programme.title: Sara Aapi
programme.desc: Sara Aapi is the story of a woman who sacrificed her dreams and the most precious years of her youth to give her three brothers the best upbringing. As Behzad watches history threatening to repeat itself, he must face his own past to protect Maani and perhaps confront the love he lost long ago. Will Maleeha return to Behzad’s life? Will Behzad save his son from the same heartbreak he experienced? Can Maani and Nimra’s love win against all odds? GEO & 7th Sky Entertainment presentation

programme.title: Rang De
programme.desc: This is the story of Dua, a lively and strong young girl who lives with her mother, Nudrat, and her grandmother, Noor Bahar. After losing her father at a young age, Dua grows up watching her mother struggle as a widow. She becomes her mother’s strength, working alongside Nudrat and Noor Bahar while also running her own vlogging channel. Life is not easy, but Dua faces it with courage. Then she makes a decision that shakes everyone around her. Dua wants her mother to marry again. In a society where such choices are questioned, her bold step brings whispers, judgment, and resistance. At the same time, Ahad, a young man who runs an antique shop with his mother Samina, crosses paths with Dua. Their families are already connected through work, but their meeting soon becomes something more personal. Before Dua and Ahad realize it, they begin to fall for each other, but circumstances take an unexpected turn. Will Dua be able to face society’s judgment for getting her mother married again? Will Dua and Ahad complete their love story? By choosing happiness for her mother, is Dua unknowingly changing her own life forever? 7th Sky Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Khush Naseebi
programme.desc: Khush Naseebi is a heartfelt story of Siraj Qasmi and his three daughters, Narmeen, Maheen, and Emaan. Siraj Qasmi is a widower who loves his daughters deeply. Narmeen and Maheen are the light of his life, but his heart remains distant from his youngest, Emaan. He carries a silent belief that her birth took away his wife, and that shadow has never left their relationship. In the same neighborhood lives Humayun, a hardworking tailor and Siraj’s favorite. He quietly loves Narmeen, but keeps his feelings hidden, believing he is not worthy of her. Like every father, Siraj dreams of seeing his daughters happily married. But before he can fulfill this wish, destiny knocks on his door. What does fate have in store for Siraj Qasmi? Will Humayun finally confess his love to Narmeen? And will Narmeen ever realize how deeply he loves her? Geo Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Hasna Mana Hai
programme.desc: There is a locality in the old city of Lahore where a young man (Host: Tabish Hashmi) has come to reside from Karachi. He is the guy who has reside in Canada too, so there is a double introduction with his name. This locality is basically a pulse of society in that almost all the segments are presents. The young man (Host) tries to understand the eccentric behavior of the people around and in doing so inadvertently offers himself to mock at. The host brings to light the fact that the morals are customs more preached than practiced while traditions are customs more practiced than preached. Gradually the host will lay bare the sensibility, psyche and sensitivity of different characters thus giving the viewers insight into the show storyline. The viewers come to know of perplexing paradoxes in the funniest way possible. In every new episode the locality is entrapped into a tricky situation which they are struggling to come out of employing street smart tactics. Notwithstanding with the fact that they condemn every other person, institution, norm and policy of the government but they exactly do contrarily to what they profess. The issues of the community revolve around small scale corruption, partisanship, political misadventures, jealousy, interference, snobbery, belittling others. They keep taunting one another using tongue in cheek remarks thus manifesting a past perennially plagued with street power struggle, political affiliation, and proclivity for easy money and predisposition to the influence. There are two different strands lurking parallel to each other in the show. The host has to entertain the audience by introducing them to socio-political anecdotes, guests, short skits, weird people, achievers, trivial but tantalizing smaller wins, social eccentricity, literary uniqueness, cultural exclusivity, musical performance, parodying, stand up comedy etc and still the other strand runs on the floor as the main subject of the show - the drama being played out by the permanent characters of the show. These permanent characters are Pehalwan, Policeman, Professor, Pehalwan's daughter, a wannabe actress, a foreign returned Pakistani, Pehalwan's wife, a shop keeper, a poet, a fatman (an idle youth), a girl singer. The show will be divided into different segments but this segmentation is not conventional. The segments will only be announced in terms of the introduction of characters or performance if need be. Usually the characters will come on their own giving an impression as if they are unwanted though the host is quite familiar with them and poses as if their forced entry is not highly welcomed.

programme.title: Ehraam-e-Junoon
programme.desc: "Ehraam-e-Junoon" follows the story of a young and immensely beautiful girl named Shanzay, who is filled with pride and stubbornness due to her upper-class upbringing. Shanzay believes that money can buy everything, including happiness. Despite her high standards, Shanzay is yet to find a man who can impress her until she meets Shayan at an event. Shayan is a handsome young man from a middle-class family, who takes up a job as a pizza delivery boy to make ends meet. Shanzay who is immediately drawn to Shayan wants to provide him with a better lifestyle however, Shayan keeps his distance and refuses to accept any of Shanzay’s advances. As the story unfolds, Shanzay and Shayan's paths cross again and again, and Shanzay begins to question her beliefs about love and money. Will Shayan be the one to break through Shanzay's walls of pride and stubbornness, or will she continue to chase after superficial things? The drama serial "Ehraam-e-Junoon" promises to take viewers on a rollercoaster ride of emotions as it explores the themes of love, pride, and class differences.

programme.title: Sara Aapi
programme.desc: Sara Aapi is the story of a woman who sacrificed her dreams and the most precious years of her youth to give her three brothers the best upbringing. After the sudden death of her parents, Sara takes control of both the family and the business. She turns them into success stories, but at the cost of her own personal life. Her world revolves around her brothers, Burhan, Adnan, and Usman. Over time, Sara becomes strict and commanding. Her decisions become law inside the house. But her strongest test begins when her brothers’ personal desires rise against her authority. Soon, tensions grow and loyalties are tested. Will Sara choose her authority over her family? Will Sara’s brothers rebel against her decisions? Can Sara keep her family together? 7th Sky Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Humrahi
programme.desc: What begins as a series of light-hearted yet unpleasant encounters between Sayhaan and Elif eventually blossoms into an unexpected and deep-rooted love. Just as they begin to find their footing together, the life of Sayhaan Ghazi is suddenly upended by a storm he did not create. When an unforeseen crisis strikes, the two pillars of his existence—his devoted love, Elif, and his formidable father—are forced to face an impossible ultimatum. Driven by a desperate, protective instinct, they make a difficult choice to shield him from a reality they believe would be his undoing. However, this well-intentioned sacrifice triggers a catastrophic chain of events, turning their home into a place of chilling distance and lifelong regret. It is a haunting exploration of how the choices made for those we love can ultimately become the very walls that permanently divide a family. Will Sayhaan’s journey forward be defined by the choices others made, or will he find a way to reclaim his own destiny? What does life look like for Elif and Sayhaan’s father when the person they tried to protect can no longer look them in the eye? Director &

programme.title: Case No.9
programme.desc: Case No 9 is an inspiring story of Sehar, a courageous and ambitious young woman who challenges societal norms and becomes a beacon of resistance for others. Sehar, confident and driven, joins the company of Kamran, a domineering businessman feared by everyone for his egoistic and controlling nature. Unlike others, Sehar refuses to conform, letting her talent and integrity shine. Sehar’s defiance unsettles Kamran, who sets out to teach her a lesson. What follows is Sehar’s journey of redemption and resilience as she navigates the challenges thrown her way. Will Kamran succeed in teaching Sehar a lesson, or will she rise above his schemes? Can Sehar find the strength and support to overcome the odds, or will Kamran’s wealth and influence prove insurmountable? Geo and 7th Sky Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Aik Aur Pakeezah
programme.desc: Geo Entertainment and Kashf Foundation present the biggest social impact story of 2026, Aik Aur Pakeezah. In today’s age of social media, cybercrime has emerged as a silent yet devastating threat, capable of shattering lives overnight. Aik Aur Pakeezah tells the story of Pakeezah, a young woman whose life takes a tragic turn. Soon, Pakeezah finds herself navigating a series of challenges that test her strength, resilience, and trust in humanity. She must confront the harsh realities of a society where privacy is fragile and reputations can be destroyed. This drama is more than a story. It reflects the dangers of our interconnected world and highlights the urgent need for awareness, caution, and understanding of the risks that affect countless lives in the digital era. Can Pakeezah confront unfavourable circumstances? Will the harsh realities of society break her down? Who will stand by her in her time of need?

programme.desc: What begins as a series of light-hearted yet unpleasant encounters between Sayhaan and Elif eventually blossoms into an unexpected and deep-rooted love. Just as they begin to find their footing together, the life of Sayhaan Ghazi is suddenly upended by a storm he did not create. When an unforeseen crisis strikes, the two pillars of his existence—his devoted love, Elif, and his formidable father—are forced to face an impossible ultimatum. Driven by a desperate, protective instinct, they make a difficult choice to shield him from a reality they believe would be his undoing. However, this well-intentioned sacrifice triggers a catastrophic chain of events, turning their home into a place of chilling distance and lifelong regret. It is a haunting exploration of how the choices made for those we love can ultimately become the very walls that permanently divide a family. Will Sayhaan’s journey forward be defined by the choices others made, or will he find a way to reclaim his own destiny? What does life look like for Elif and Sayhaan’s father when the person they tried to protect can no longer look them in the eye? Director &

programme.title: Rang De
programme.desc: This is the story of Dua, a lively and strong young girl who lives with her mother, Nudrat, and her grandmother, Noor Bahar. After losing her father at a young age, Dua grows up watching her mother struggle as a widow. She becomes her mother’s strength, working alongside Nudrat and Noor Bahar while also running her own vlogging channel. Life is not easy, but Dua faces it with courage. Then she makes a decision that shakes everyone around her. Dua wants her mother to marry again. In a society where such choices are questioned, her bold step brings whispers, judgment, and resistance. At the same time, Ahad, a young man who runs an antique shop with his mother Samina, crosses paths with Dua. Their families are already connected through work, but their meeting soon becomes something more personal. Before Dua and Ahad realize it, they begin to fall for each other, but circumstances take an unexpected turn. Will Dua be able to face society’s judgment for getting her mother married again? Will Dua and Ahad complete their love story? By choosing happiness for her mother, is Dua unknowingly changing her own life forever? 7th Sky Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Aik Aur Pakeezah
programme.desc: Geo Entertainment and Kashf Foundation present the biggest social impact story of 2026, Aik Aur Pakeezah. In today’s age of social media, cybercrime has emerged as a silent yet devastating threat, capable of shattering lives overnight. Aik Aur Pakeezah tells the story of Pakeezah, a young woman whose life takes a tragic turn. Soon, Pakeezah finds herself navigating a series of challenges that test her strength, resilience, and trust in humanity. She must confront the harsh realities of a society where privacy is fragile and reputations can be destroyed. This drama is more than a story. It reflects the dangers of our interconnected world and highlights the urgent need for awareness, caution, and understanding of the risks that affect countless lives in the digital era. Can Pakeezah confront unfavourable circumstances? Will the harsh realities of society break her down? Who will stand by her in her time of need?

programme.title: Hasna Mana Hai
programme.desc: There is a locality in the old city of Lahore where a young man (Host: Tabish Hashmi) has come to reside from Karachi. He is the guy who has reside in Canada too, so there is a double introduction with his name. This locality is basically a pulse of society in that almost all the segments are presents. The young man (Host) tries to understand the eccentric behavior of the people around and in doing so inadvertently offers himself to mock at. The host brings to light the fact that the morals are customs more preached than practiced while traditions are customs more practiced than preached. Gradually the host will lay bare the sensibility, psyche and sensitivity of different characters thus giving the viewers insight into the show storyline. The viewers come to know of perplexing paradoxes in the funniest way possible. In every new episode the locality is entrapped into a tricky situation which they are struggling to come out of employing street smart tactics. Notwithstanding with the fact that they condemn every other person, institution, norm and policy of the government but they exactly do contrarily to what they profess. The issues of the community revolve around small scale corruption, partisanship, political misadventures, jealousy, interference, snobbery, belittling others. They keep taunting one another using tongue in cheek remarks thus manifesting a past perennially plagued with street power struggle, political affiliation, and proclivity for easy money and predisposition to the influence. There are two different strands lurking parallel to each other in the show. The host has to entertain the audience by introducing them to socio-political anecdotes, guests, short skits, weird people, achievers, trivial but tantalizing smaller wins, social eccentricity, literary uniqueness, cultural exclusivity, musical performance, parodying, stand up comedy etc and still the other strand runs on the floor as the main subject of the show - the drama being played out by the permanent characters of the show. These permanent characters are Pehalwan, Policeman, Professor, Pehalwan's daughter, a wannabe actress, a foreign returned Pakistani, Pehalwan's wife, a shop keeper, a poet, a fatman (an idle youth), a girl singer. The show will be divided into different segments but this segmentation is not conventional. The segments will only be announced in terms of the introduction of characters or performance if need be. Usually the characters will come on their own giving an impression as if they are unwanted though the host is quite familiar with them and poses as if their forced entry is not highly welcomed.

programme.title: Case No.9
programme.desc: Case No 9 is an inspiring story of Sehar, a courageous and ambitious young woman who challenges societal norms and becomes a beacon of resistance for others. Sehar, confident and driven, joins the company of Kamran, a domineering businessman feared by everyone for his egoistic and controlling nature. Unlike others, Sehar refuses to conform, letting her talent and integrity shine. Sehar’s defiance unsettles Kamran, who sets out to teach her a lesson. What follows is Sehar’s journey of redemption and resilience as she navigates the challenges thrown her way. Will Kamran succeed in teaching Sehar a lesson, or will she rise above his schemes? Can Sehar find the strength and support to overcome the odds, or will Kamran’s wealth and influence prove insurmountable? Geo and 7th Sky Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Pehli Barish
programme.desc: Pehli Barish is a story of love that spans generations, a tale of joy, longing, and heartbreak that seems to repeat itself. Years ago in Lahore, strangers Behzad and Maleeha met and a spark of love lit between them. But fate had other plans and tore them apart, leaving hearts scarred. Decades later, Behzad lives a settled life with a family, yet the past never truly leaves him. His son, Maani, falls for Nimra and the shadows of old heartbreak loom large. As Behzad watches history threatening to repeat itself, he must face his own past to protect Maani and perhaps confront the love he lost long ago. Will Maleeha return to Behzad’s life? Will Behzad save his son from the same heartbreak he experienced? Can Maani and Nimra’s love win against all odds? GEO & 7th Sky Entertainment presentation

programme.title: Ehraam-e-Junoon
programme.desc: "Ehraam-e-Junoon" follows the story of a young and immensely beautiful girl named Shanzay, who is filled with pride and stubbornness due to her upper-class upbringing. Shanzay believes that money can buy everything, including happiness. Despite her high standards, Shanzay is yet to find a man who can impress her until she meets Shayan at an event. Shayan is a handsome young man from a middle-class family, who takes up a job as a pizza delivery boy to make ends meet. Shanzay who is immediately drawn to Shayan wants to provide him with a better lifestyle however, Shayan keeps his distance and refuses to accept any of Shanzay’s advances. As the story unfolds, Shanzay and Shayan's paths cross again and again, and Shanzay begins to question her beliefs about love and money. Will Shayan be the one to break through Shanzay's walls of pride and stubbornness, or will she continue to chase after superficial things? The drama serial "Ehraam-e-Junoon" promises to take viewers on a rollercoaster ride of emotions as it explores the themes of love, pride, and class differences.

At the same time, Ahad, a young man who runs an antique shop with his mother Samina, crosses paths with Dua. Their families are already connected through work, but their meeting soon becomes something more personal. Before Dua and Ahad realize it, they begin to fall for each other, but circumstances take an unexpected turn. Will Dua be able to face society’s judgment for getting her mother married again? Will Dua and Ahad complete their love story? By choosing happiness for her mother, is Dua unknowingly changing her own life forever? 7th Sky Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Pehli Barish
programme.desc: Pehli Barish is a story of love that spans generations, a tale of joy, longing, and heartbreak that seems to repeat itself. Years ago in Lahore, strangers Behzad and Maleeha met and a spark of love lit between them. But fate had other plans and tore them apart, leaving hearts scarred. Decades later, Behzad lives a settled life with a family, yet the past never truly leaves him. His son, Maani, falls for Nimra and the shadows of old heartbreak loom large. As Behzad watches history threatening to repeat itself, he must face his own past to protect Maani and perhaps confront the love he lost long ago. Will Maleeha return to Behzad’s life? Will Behzad save his son from the same heartbreak he experienced? Can Maani and Nimra’s love win against all odds? GEO & 7th Sky Entertainment presentation

programme.title: Hasna Mana Hai
programme.desc: There is a locality in the old city of Lahore where a young man (Host: Tabish Hashmi) has come to reside from Karachi. He is the guy who has reside in Canada too, so there is a double introduction with his name. This locality is basically a pulse of society in that almost all the segments are presents. The young man (Host) tries to understand the eccentric behavior of the people around and in doing so inadvertently offers himself to mock at. The host brings to light the fact that the morals are customs more preached than practiced while traditions are customs more practiced than preached. Gradually the host will lay bare the sensibility, psyche and sensitivity of different characters thus giving the viewers insight into the show storyline. The viewers come to know of perplexing paradoxes in the funniest way possible. In every new episode the locality is entrapped into a tricky situation which they are struggling to come out of employing street smart tactics. Notwithstanding with the fact that they condemn every other person, institution, norm and policy of the government but they exactly do contrarily to what they profess. The issues of the community revolve around small scale corruption, partisanship, political misadventures, jealousy, interference, snobbery, belittling others. They keep taunting one another using tongue in cheek remarks thus manifesting a past perennially plagued with street power struggle, political affiliation, and proclivity for easy money and predisposition to the influence. There are two different strands lurking parallel to each other in the show. The host has to entertain the audience by introducing them to socio-political anecdotes, guests, short skits, weird people, achievers, trivial but tantalizing smaller wins, social eccentricity, literary uniqueness, cultural exclusivity, musical performance, parodying, stand up comedy etc and still the other strand runs on the floor as the main subject of the show - the drama being played out by the permanent characters of the show. These permanent characters are Pehalwan, Policeman, Professor, Pehalwan's daughter, a wannabe actress, a foreign returned Pakistani, Pehalwan's wife, a shop keeper, a poet, a fatman (an idle youth), a girl singer. The show will be divided into different segments but this segmentation is not conventional. The segments will only be announced in terms of the introduction of characters or performance if need be. Usually the characters will come on their own giving an impression as if they are unwanted though the host is quite familiar with them and poses as if their forced entry is not highly welcomed.

programme.title: Humrahi
programme.desc: What begins as a series of light-hearted yet unpleasant encounters between Sayhaan and Elif eventually blossoms into an unexpected and deep-rooted love. Just as they begin to find their footing together, the life of Sayhaan Ghazi is suddenly upended by a storm he did not create. When an unforeseen crisis strikes, the two pillars of his existence—his devoted love, Elif, and his formidable father—are forced to face an impossible ultimatum. Driven by a desperate, protective instinct, they make a difficult choice to shield him from a reality they believe would be his undoing. However, this well-intentioned sacrifice triggers a catastrophic chain of events, turning their home into a place of chilling distance and lifelong regret. It is a haunting exploration of how the choices made for those we love can ultimately become the very walls that permanently divide a family. Will Sayhaan’s journey forward be defined by the choices others made, or will he find a way to reclaim his own destiny? What does life look like for Elif and Sayhaan’s father when the person they tried to protect can no longer look them in the eye? Director &

programme.title: Khush Naseebi
programme.desc: Khush Naseebi is a heartfelt story of Siraj Qasmi and his three daughters, Narmeen, Maheen, and Emaan. Siraj Qasmi is a widower who loves his daughters deeply. Narmeen and Maheen are the light of his life, but his heart remains distant from his youngest, Emaan. He carries a silent belief that her birth took away his wife, and that shadow has never left their relationship. In the same neighborhood lives Humayun, a hardworking tailor and Siraj’s favorite. He quietly loves Narmeen, but keeps his feelings hidden, believing he is not worthy of her. Like every father, Siraj dreams of seeing his daughters happily married. But before he can fulfill this wish, destiny knocks on his door. What does fate have in store for Siraj Qasmi? Will Humayun finally confess his love to Narmeen? And will Narmeen ever realize how deeply he loves her? Geo Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Shaidai
programme.desc: Shaidai is a celebration of love, a story that dares to ask what happens when the most beautiful feeling in the world turns into its greatest test. Ali Khan stands at the peak of the world others only dream of. Driven, relentless, and accustomed to getting what he wants, yet beneath that iron exterior lives a quietly devoted grandson. Miral is a self made girl who wants to do everything on her own. Vivid, sharp tongued, and fiercely certain of her own path, she moves through life with a conviction that refuses to be dimmed. Fate, indifferent to logic and timing, brings their names together. But love, it seems, has made enemies before they even knew it existed. From the shadows, forces driven by old grievances and hidden motives begin to close in, testing not just their bond but everything they believe in. What storms lie ahead in Ali and Miral’s love? Can two people who found each other against all odds hold on when the odds turn against them? And when love is pushed to its breaking point, who will be left standing? 7th Sky Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Rang De
programme.desc: This is the story of Dua, a lively and strong young girl who lives with her mother, Nudrat, and her grandmother, Noor Bahar. After losing her father at a young age, Dua grows up watching her mother struggle as a widow. She becomes her mother’s strength, working alongside Nudrat and Noor Bahar while also running her own vlogging channel. Life is not easy, but Dua faces it with courage. Then she makes a decision that shakes everyone around her. Dua wants her mother to marry again. In a society where such choices are questioned, her bold step brings whispers, judgment, and resistance. At the same time, Ahad, a young man who runs an antique shop with his mother Samina, crosses paths with Dua. Their families are already connected through work, but their meeting soon becomes something more personal. Before Dua and Ahad realize it, they begin to fall for each other, but circumstances take an unexpected turn. Will Dua be able to face society’s judgment for getting her mother married again? Will Dua and Ahad complete their love story? By choosing happiness for her mother, is Dua unknowingly changing her own life forever? 7th Sky Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Case No.9
programme.desc: Case No 9 is an inspiring story of Sehar, a courageous and ambitious young woman who challenges societal norms and becomes a beacon of resistance for others. Sehar, confident and driven, joins the company of Kamran, a domineering businessman feared by everyone for his egoistic and controlling nature. Unlike others, Sehar refuses to conform, letting her talent and integrity shine. Sehar’s defiance unsettles Kamran, who sets out to teach her a lesson. What follows is Sehar’s journey of redemption and resilience as she navigates the challenges thrown her way. Will Kamran succeed in teaching Sehar a lesson, or will she rise above his schemes? Can Sehar find the strength and support to overcome the odds, or will Kamran’s wealth and influence prove insurmountable? Geo and 7th Sky Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: My Baby Gone

programme.title: Killer Night Shift

programme.desc: (2019) Thriller with Vanessa Marcil. A college student returns home to discover her mother has a new fiancé. But as she finds out more about him, should it be alarm bells rather than wedding bells?

programme.desc: After losing her child, Olivia meets a woman and her daughter.

programme.desc: (2022) Unsettling psychological thriller starring Eva Green. A fashion designer suffers from a puzzling illness that confounds her doctors - until a mysterious caregiver reveals a horrifying truth...

programme.title: American Siege

programme.desc: (2008) Action starring Ivan Sergei. When archaeologist Jack Hunter's mentor is killed, he must find the culprit and stop ancient treasure falling into the wrong hands.

programme.title: Ride in The Whirlwind

programme.title: Love at The Ranch
programme.desc: Journalist Allison Sawyer visits the remote Clybourne Ranch, the setting of her favourite author's books. Starring Laura Mitchell (2021)

programme.title: Puppy Love

programme.title: A Tail Of Love
programme.desc: (2022) Paw-some romance with Brittany Bristow. After funding for a dog shelter is cut, a former solider makes room in his heart for one of the rescues - and the beautiful woman running the centre.

programme.title: Dog Lovers Guide to Dating
programme.desc: (2023) Rom com with Rebecca Dalton. Love goes off-leash as dog trainer Alex helps a hopeless romantic woo his crush and her unruly pup! As they team up, love might lead them down a different path.

programme.title: Butlers In Love
programme.desc: (2022) Christmas rom com with Stacey Faber. Sparks fly at the American Butler Academy as chalk and cheese students Emma and Henry clash. In learning to work together might they fall for each other?

programme.title: Splash of Love
programme.desc: (2022) Aquatic rom com with Rhiannon Fish. Out in the Pacific Northwest to study orcas, can Chloe find love with the help of local whale spotting guide Ben and not feel like a fish out of water?

programme.title: Two Chefs and A Wedding Cake
programme.desc: (2022) Foodie fun romance. Sparks fly for a food critic at her sister's wedding when she clashes with a chef infamous for banning reviewers from his restaurant. Can they turn rivalry into romance?

programme.title: Date with Love
programme.desc: (2016) Romance with Shenae Grimes-Beech. A small-town boy's proposal goes viral and scores him a prom date with a celebrity - but falling for the boy's teacher wasn't the plan.

programme.title: Love on Iceland
programme.desc: Chole wishes to bring her college friends back together for a trip to Iceland. Will an unexpected guest and seeing the northern lights, give her the new perspective on life and love? (2020)

programme.title: Technically Yours
programme.desc: (2025) Romance with Kristi Murdock and Thomas Gipson. Tech prodigy Erin convinces her office nemesis to pose as her boyfriend at her sister's wedding. But will this deep fake turn into real love?

programme.title: The Love Gala
programme.desc: (2022) Stylish romcom with Lesa Wilson and Marc Herrmann. With just two weeks to plan the year's biggest fashion event - her mum's Garden Gala - will a trio of love interests spoil Kate's soiree?

programme.title: Vote One for Love
programme.desc: (2023) Romance starring Natasha Wilson and Jesse Hutch. Will hearts be won on the campaign trail when political strategist Candace returns to her hometown to help the mayoral candidate?

programme.title: How to Win a Prince
programme.desc: (2023) Regal romcom starring Anna Hopkins and Ryan Bruce. Matchmaker Nina is NYC's very own Cupid - but when an unlucky-in-love royal needs her help, will she find her happily ever after too?

programme.title: Luckless In Love
programme.desc: Blogger Winnie and sports agent Holden are both dating with the intention to further their career. As their feelings grow, they discover the only people they are lying to are themselves. (2022)

programme.title: Love, Fall and Order
programme.desc: City lawyer Claire returns home to save her a family's pumpkin farm over a property dispute. The opposing lawyer is Patrick, her high school debate class nemesis. (2019)

programme.title: Her Pen Pal
programme.desc: Victoria is in Paris for friend's wedding, but she needs a date to make her ex believe she's over him, will Jacques her childhood French pen pal assist her in this ruse? (2021)

programme.title: The Best Version of Love
programme.desc: Image consultant Rebecca must clean up an arrogant ex-soccer players image. Will Rebecca be able to raise to the challenge to help Clive become the best version of himself? (2022)

programme.title: Humnava
programme.desc: Humnava is more than just a drama it’s an emotional journey through love betrayal and resilience. It tells the story of a woman whose world is shaken when the one she trusted the most breaks her heart. But this is not just her story it reflects the pain of every person who’s ever been torn between loyalty and heartbreak. As relationships are tested and conspiracies unfold Humnava shows how real love doesn’t fade it fights it survives and it rises. Through shattered trust emotional trials and inner strength this drama is a reminder that in the end truth and sincerity always win.

programme.title: Green Entertainment Programme
programme.desc: Green Entertainment provides Pakistani dramas, original series, and family entertainment programming.

programme.title: Rahguzar
programme.desc: Some paths are not chosen, they are lived. Rahguzar explores the delicate nature of relationships, where emotions collide with ego and silence becomes louder than words. When bonds are fragile, every decision matters. A single moment can reshape lives, turning love into distance and understanding into regret.

programme.title: Green Entertainment Programme
programme.desc: Green Entertainment provides Pakistani dramas, original series, and family entertainment programming.

programme.title: Maa
programme.desc: Maa is an emotional family drama about love, loss, and identity. The story follows Raaha, a lively young girl raised by her grandfather, unaware of the painful truth about her birth. Abandoned by her mother Tara to protect her, and separated from her parents due to class differences and betrayal. Will Raaha uncover the truth about her past and find the love she was denied?

When bonds are fragile, every decision matters. A single moment can reshape lives, turning love into distance and understanding into regret.

programme.title: Green Entertainment Programme
programme.desc: Green Entertainment provides Pakistani dramas, original series, and family entertainment programming.

programme.title: Humnava
programme.desc: Humnava is more than just a drama it’s an emotional journey through love betrayal and resilience. It tells the story of a woman whose world is shaken when the one she trusted the most breaks her heart. But this is not just her story it reflects the pain of every person who’s ever been torn between loyalty and heartbreak. As relationships are tested and conspiracies unfold Humnava shows how real love doesn’t fade it fights it survives and it rises. Through shattered trust emotional trials and inner strength this drama is a reminder that in the end truth and sincerity always win.

programme.title: Faaslay
programme.desc: Zaviyar and Ainy , best friends since childhood, bound by love but torn apart by ego and misunderstandings. Ainy dreams of owning her own restaurant, while Zaviyar, a rich architect, lives in a world far from hers. When class, pride, and family conspiracies collide, destiny forces them into marriage , a love they always wanted but never confessed. Will they overcome their faaslay (distances) and choose love over ego? Watch Faaslay, a heartfelt tale of dreams, pride, and second chances

programme.title: Lousy neighbour
programme.desc: You're young, you're attractive, and you want to make something of yourself. In order to achieve success, you move to the big city with a heart full of certainty that luck is always on your side. But how to not lose yourself in the vast sea of countless opportunities? How to know what's really important for you and what is nonessential? Kate is a 23-year-old makeup artist from a small provincial town, and she's absolutely certain that she's got what it takes! She can do it - period! She's joyfully advancing towards her dream with a smile on her face, happy to help anyone in need of her positive attitude along the way. Not even sudden unexpected hardships and difficulties can get her down. But fate seems to be constantly testing her optimism. Will she make it through and come out a winner after all?

programme.title: Sweating Bullets
programme.desc: A slain socialite's children accuse their stepfather of the crime.

programme.title: Sweating Bullets

programme.title: Animal Science
programme.desc: The lifecycle of the butterfly; how birds fly; how a Venus flytrap catches its prey.

programme.title: Animal Science
programme.desc: The jaguar's spots; how a bee sting works; salmon migrate thousands of miles to spawn.

programme.title: Xploration Awesome Planet
programme.desc: An environmental painter, a sculptor, a photographer and a craftsman blend nature with art.

programme.title: Xploration Awesome Planet
programme.desc: The Great Barrier Reef; the National Sea Simulator at the Australian Institute of Marine Science.

programme.title: Xploration Awesome Planet
programme.desc: In New Zealand, Cousteau explores a volcanic field and sees one of the world's largest insects.

programme.title: Xploration Awesome Planet
