programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: Hetty turns in retirement papers and disappears; Sam insists that Callen find a new partner.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: When the daughter of a notorious counterfeiter arrives in town, Sam goes under cover as a financier.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: The team discovers that classified surveillance briefs may have been sold to a foreign buyer.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: When weapons worth $1 million are stolen, the team tracks the evidence to a charity event.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: Sam goes under cover as a day trader after an investment banker who has ties to Russia is murdered.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: LAPD Detective Whiting calls in a favor when Deeks' former partner goes rogue.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: Kensi is transported to a missile launch facility to help thwart a takeover of nuclear weapons.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: SWAT imposters commit home invasions; Hondo has suspicions about the burglarized families.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: Hondo allows newbie Jim Street to go undercover to bust a ruthless trafficker.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: Hondo's imprisoned childhood friend asks him for help; the team encounters a new local crime outfit.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: The team works during Christmas vacation when a drug cartel's cache of gold bars is stolen.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: Deacon leads the team in finding a robbery crew that is hitting marijuana dispensaries.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: The team tries to rescue civilian hostages during a prison riot; Hondo suspects an ulterior motive.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: Hondo teams up with an old DEA friend to unmask the secret leader of a drug smuggling ring.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: Hondo's team and the FBI go on a manhunt to find a militia group planning a domestic terror attack.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: SWAT imposters commit home invasions; Hondo has suspicions about the burglarized families.

programme.title: The New Frontier S2 - "First Light"
programme.desc: For an instrument first developed as recently as the 17th century, the telescope has travelled a long way. The latest version of the once-humble telescope will be going a lot farther – carrying us ever closer to the first light.

programme.title: The New Frontier S2 - "Stars Above"
programme.desc: Stars are a bit like human beings. They can be warm or cold, they come in all kinds of shapes and sizes… and, let’s face it, they can be dim or bright. Recent discoveries suggest the number of stars in our galaxy alone may exceed 200 billion.

programme.title: The New Frontier S2 - "The Dark Side"
programme.desc: Perhaps that American politician was right. There are indeed things we know we don’t know. For instance, cosmologically speaking, we know we don’t know much – and certainly not nearly enough – about two of the enduring mysteries of the Universe.

programme.title: Space Greed S1 - "Asteroid Mining: Is The Next Gold Rush in Space?"
programme.sub-title: Asteroid Mining: Is The Next Gold Rush in Space?
programme.desc: The asteroids flying through our solar system contain tons and tons of precious metals, stones, and more. Are the astronomical profits from mining asteroids all hype?

programme.title: Space Greed S1 - "Endangered Aliens: Will Humans Trash Space?"
programme.sub-title: Endangered Aliens: Will Humans Trash Space?
programme.desc: Sci-Fi has always shocked audiences with images of powerful aliens invading and destroying Earth. What if WE are actually the invasive alien species?

programme.title: Rethink S1 - "Is moving pictures an illusion?"
programme.desc: In a world where nothing is what it seems, take a look at the shades of colour, explore the Body transfer illusion, Liars paradox and video. Is moving pictures an illusion?

programme.title: Rethink S1 - "Is a telescope a time machine?"
programme.sub-title: Is a telescope a time machine?
programme.desc: In a world where nothing is what it seems, we explore tricks using sleight of hand. Play games with a water bottle, take a look at the Dunning Kruger effect and answer the question; Is a telescope a time machine?

programme.title: Rethink S1 - "The Leidenfrost Effect"
programme.desc: In a world where nothing is what it seems, let’s play games with colour changing milk. Learn about chroma keys in video editing and do some mental math gymnastics. We’ll also explore the Leidenfrost effect and take a look at rethinker Linwood G Dunn.

programme.title: Rethink S1 - "Rotoscoping"
programme.desc: In a world where nothing is what it seems, we’ll discuss the animation technique of Rotoscoping, take another look at card tricks, the history of juggling and the popularity of the Smart phone.

programme.title: The Demolition Man S1 - "Newcastle"
programme.desc: Taking down eight giant towers will take expert precision, planning & explosives. It’s imperative none of them fall in the wrong direction or fire any debris.

programme.title: The Demolition Man S1 - "City of London"
programme.desc: An asbestos ridden 1960s building in the crowded City of London is to be demolished to make way for a new hotel.

programme.title: The Demolition Man S1 - "The Best of Part 2"
programme.desc: Brendan Moar looks back at the most interesting and dramatic moments that he’s encountered as The Demolition Man.

programme.title: Razor: Science For a Better Future S1 - ""The Way" to Fusion"
programme.desc: Neil Cairns visits ITER in France, where nuclear fusion could provide unlimited clean energy, to see progress and challenges firsthand.

programme.title: Razor: Science For a Better Future S1 - "Urban Microbiome"
programme.desc: Research shows sanitized cities reduce beneficial microbes, harming health and increasing allergies and autoimmune diseases.

programme.title: How Do They Do It S13 - "Caravans/Tuning Forks/Ice Resurfacer/Festival of Lights"
programme.desc: How do they build a caravan that’s tougher than an SUV? How do they forge tuning forks to provide musicians with perfect pitch? How do they resurface an ice rink in minutes? How do they put on the world’s biggest festival of lights?

programme.title: How Do They Do It S13 - "Vinyl Records/Bumper Cars/Tiger Balm"
programme.desc: How do they make the world’s grooviest music, the vinyl LP? How do they build the world’s most crashed car, the dodgem? How do they create one of the world’s oldest pain remedies, tiger balm?

programme.title: How Do They Do It S13 - "Alcohol Free Beer/Tomcars/Escalators/Lie Detectors"
programme.desc: How do they brew a beer that won’t make you drunk? How do they build a car that flies over rocks and boulders? How do they bolt together an escalator that will carry millions every year? How do they bust criminals with a lie detector?

programme.title: How Do They Do It S13 - "Axes/Messenger Bags/Fast Rescue Boats"
programme.desc: How do they forge one of the greatest inventions of all time, the axe? How do they cut, sew, stitch and glue together a courier’s messenger bag? How do they build the world’s fastest lifeboats?

programme.title: Science of Sound S1 - "Developing Our Taste in Music"
programme.desc: In the era of music streaming, there are millions of songs at our fingertips. But in a world of near infinite music choices, music discovery and exposure have changed drastically.

programme.title: Suppressed Science S1 - "Merging Man & Machine"
programme.desc: Why fear the rise of the machines, when we can merge and rise along with them?

programme.title: Suppressed Science S1 - "The Suppressed Science Of Psychedelics"
programme.desc: Join Athena as she explores the underground world of psychedelic science, and the revolutionary impact it is poised to have on the pharmaceutical industries.

programme.title: Suppressed Science S1 - "Race: Science, Social Construct, or Both?"
programme.sub-title: Race: Science, Social Construct, or Both?
programme.desc: The concept of race was invented during colonial and imperialist eras as a means to reify political power structures.

programme.title: Suppressed Science S1 - "Weather Control: The Debate Over Geo-Engineering"
programme.sub-title: Weather Control: The Debate Over Geo-Engineering
programme.desc: In this episode, Athena takes on the controversial topic of Geoengineering, and meets scientists working on an ambitious plan to put a shield around the planet.

programme.title: Digits S1 - "Guardians of the Web"
programme.desc: Explore how our reliance on the web creates vulnerability to everything from cyber theft to an Internet system failure. Muller introduces viewers to “white hat” hackers, the U.S. Secret Service’s cybercrime division and even West Point soldiers.

programme.title: Skuld: A Look into the Future S1 - "Future of Living Part 1"
programme.desc: Learn about future of living at the International Furniture Fair Cologne: vertical cities, new housing concepts & home innovations.

programme.title: Skuld: A Look into the Future S1 - "The future of communication"
programme.desc: Check the future of communication and satellite connection to the Internet in all parts of the world, especially on cruise ships.

programme.title: Skuld: A Look into the Future S1 - "High Tech Everyday"
programme.desc: With the technology we use daily, technology companies are trying to innovate and make their inventions more user-friendly in a digital and internet-connected world.

programme.title: Skuld: A Look into the Future S1 - "Future of Living Part 2"
programme.desc: Learn about trends and technologies in the smart kitchen, the digitization of living spaces and changes due to the pandemic and the home office.

programme.title: The Aviators S2 - "Aviation 101"
programme.desc: An explanation of some of the very basics of aviation.

programme.title: The Aviators S2 - "ATC gibberish"
programme.desc: Breaking down and simplifying all that complex sounding radio chatter. Sara learns how to escape from a submerged aircraft and take to the air with a team of formation pilots flying WW2 era planes.

programme.title: The Aviators S2 - "Can a kid land an airliner?"
programme.sub-title: Can a kid land an airliner?
programme.desc: A follow up to some of the popular sim segments from season one, but this time with a 12 year old at the controls! Kurtis shows us the many important functions of an often overlooked aspect of Air Traffic Control services and Anthony and Raeleen dig in at Greenville, SC.

programme.title: The Aviators S2 - "Private pilot emergency"
programme.desc: Anthony closes the season 2 sim segments by having everything but the kitchen sink thrown at him. Can he do it? Spend the day at MCAS Miramar (formerly Top Gun), with US Marine fighter pilots at their legendary base.

programme.title: Vet Tales S1 - "Robbie"
programme.desc: Howdie and Dawn are working dogs and their owner wants them to mate, but neither are interested so Stacey intervenes, Mark treats a horse with a very sore leg and Stacey operates on sushi the cat who has skin cancer.

programme.title: Vet Tales S1 - "Willow"
programme.desc: Willow’s leg is lame and Stacey decides to amputate, Jack the Jack Russel has been kicked out of doggy school and Stacey tries to help and Mark changes Shadow the cat from a male into a female.

programme.title: Blue Realm S1 - "Manatees and Dugongs"
programme.desc: Each year, hundreds of critically endangered manatees are killed in U.S. waters by boats, disease and cold weather. 2006 was the worst year on record for manatee deaths 416 animals perished.

programme.title: Blue Realm S1 - "Toxic Invaders"
programme.desc: They're beautiful - and deadly, with venomous spines that resemble a lion's mane. They're lionfish, a tropical reef species normally found in the Indo-Pacific.

programme.title: Blue Realm S1 - "Reefs of Steel"
programme.desc: Around the globe, thousands of decommissioned naval vessels rot in dockyards. What can you do with these toxic time bombs? One solution is to clean them well, blow them up and sink them!

programme.title: Blue Realm S1 - "Shark Nation"
programme.desc: There's no doubt sharks have an image problem. And they're certainly in trouble globally. The population of some species has declined by more than 90% due to over fishing.

programme.title: Saving the Mustang - America's Horse on the Brink
programme.desc: Saving The Mustang explores the state of wild horses today through the efforts of three individuals. All stories interweave a compelling tale of perseverance and determination.

programme.title: Shark Dive TV S1 - "Shark Feeding Frenzies"
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV studies Whale Sharks kept in a giant tank and then takes a Deeper Dive by explaining shark hearing, shark feeding frenzies and Great White Sharks.

programme.title: Shark Dive TV S1 - "Sharks Electrosensory Systems"
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV dives with Bull Sharks in Cancun, Mexico and analyzes sharks electrosensory systems.

programme.title: Shark Dive TV S1 - "Sand Tiger Sharks as Protectors"
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV demonstrates how Sand Tiger Sharks act as protectors and takes a Deeper Dive by explaining male vs female shark differences, shark reproduction, Gray Reef Sharks and shark buoyancy.

programme.desc: When the LAPD's elite Special Investigations Squad (SIS) is assigned a high-profile quadruple homicide, veteran detective Eldon Perry (Kurt Russell) takes the case. Known for his tough street tactics and a fiery temper, Eldon also tutors rookie Bobby Keough (Scott Speedman) in the grim realities of police intimidation and corruption. While navigating the tumultuous neighborhoods of South Central L.A., Perry and Keough must track down the cold-blooded killers as well as face their own demons - demons that prove more ruthless than the criminals they pursue.

programme.title: Mayday : Air Disaster
programme.desc: The pilots of Transair 671 manage a miraculous landing at a French military airfield.

programme.title: Aerial America

programme.title: Aerial America

programme.title: Aerial America
programme.desc: Experience all sides of Washington State, from thousands of feet in the air.

programme.title: Air Disasters
programme.desc: Two identical plane crashes involving the same icy conditions and the same plane design are examined, revealing why neither disaster should have happened.

programme.title: Air Disasters
programme.desc: The 1988 crash of an Airbus A320 at an airshow sets off a public battle between investigators and the plane's pilot.

programme.title: Air Disasters
programme.desc: Plane crashes caused by communication breakdowns expose the changes that need to be made to our overburdened air traffic control system.

programme.title: Air Disasters
programme.desc: A 1992 crash in France's Vosges Mountains is examined, detailing the difficulties in finding the downed plane and then finding reasons for the accident.

programme.title: Air Disasters
programme.desc: Two planes collide on the LAX runway when they're mistakenly assigned the same runway at the same time.

programme.title: Aerial America
programme.desc: Visit Louisiana, the state where the Big Muddy comes to an end and the Big Easy comes to life.

programme.title: Aerial America
programme.desc: See what brought Billy the Kid, the makers of the atomic bomb, and perhaps even visitors from far away galaxies to New Mexico.

programme.title: Aerial America
programme.desc: Discover Michigan's diverse history and its visionaries who built empires, started unions, and helped win a World War.

programme.title: Aerial America
programme.desc: Discover the highs and lows of Nevada's history, and the booms and busts that have defined it.

programme.title: Aerial America
programme.desc: Colorado is a state with a history, marked by war, a gold rush, and legendary bank robberies. Through it all, Colorado remains a feast for the eyes.

programme.title: Aerial America
programme.desc: Take flight on this journey over Mississippi, a land of hospitality, beauty, and complexity.

programme.title: WWIIs Most Daring Raids

programme.title: Underworld: Blood Wars
programme.desc: The fifth installment of the Underworld franchise.

programme.title: Black and Blue (2019)
programme.desc: After capturing crooked cops killing drug dealers on her body cam, a female rookie must evade the narcotics officers who are after the incriminating evidence.

programme.title: Blue Streak
programme.desc: Miles Logan (Martin Lawrence) is a talented jewel thief who has stolen $20 million dollars worth of diamonds and has hidden them at a construction site before being captured. Now, after three years in jail, he returns to pick up the diamonds only to find that the site is now a police precinct.

programme.title: Takers (2010)
programme.desc: Matt Dillon, Idris Elba, Paul Walker and Hayden Christiansen star in this action-packed thriller full of twists and turns.

programme.title: Salt
programme.desc: Angelina Jolie stars in Columbia Pictures' Salt, a contemporary espionage thriller. Before becoming a CIA officer, Evelyn Salt (Jolie) swore an oath to duty, honor, and country. She will prove loyal to these when a defector accuses her of being a Russian sleeper spy. Salt goes on the run, using all her skills and years of experience as a covert operative to elude capture, protect her husband, and stay one step ahead of her colleagues at the CIA.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Extinction
programme.desc: Milla Jovovich is back to kill more zombies in the third chapter of the hit Resident Evil franchise! An action/horror film filled with huge special effects and edge-of-your-seat terror! Survivors of the Raccoon City catastrophe travel across the Nevada desert, hoping to make it to Alaska. Alice (Jovovich) joins the caravan and their fight against the evil Umbrella Corp.

programme.title: Rambo (2008)
programme.desc: Twenty years have passed and John Rambo has retreated to northern Thailand. When a group of human rights missionaries fall into the hands of the Burmese army he sets aside his reluctance for violence and conflict and the Vietnam lethal super soldier re-emerges.

programme.title: I Still Know What You Did Last Summer
programme.desc: Haunted by the brutal murders of her friends, Julie James is struggling to lead a normal life as a college freshman in Boston.

programme.title: 8 Million Ways To Die
programme.desc: Trying to help a Los Angeles prostitute, an alcholoic ex-cop runs up against her vicious Colombian drug dealer boyfriend.

programme.title: Ricki And The Flash
programme.desc: A woman abandons her family when she is younger to find fame and fortune as a rock star. Decades later, she decides to be a mother again to her estranged children, one of whom is going through a rough divorce.

programme.title: It Could Happen To You
programme.desc: Much to the horror of his upwardly mobile wife, a New York City cop makes good on his promise to split his lottery winnings with a waitress in this delightful comedy. Money changes everything, and all three lives are transformed in this charming comedy.

programme.title: Made Of Honor
programme.desc: Tom loves his life, until he realizes he also loves his best friend Hannah. But when Hannah gets engaged to a dashing Scotsman and asks Tom to be her maid of honor, Tom faces hostile bridesmaids, bridal showers, and bad hair days, all in an effort to pull off the perfect wedding and steal the bride. He&apos's a maid of honor with a plan.

programme.title: Sydney White
programme.desc: In a college comedy that puts a modern-day twist on an age-old story, Sydney White tells the tale of a tomboy freshman who ditches her conniving sorority sisters and finds a new home with a group of very dorky outcasts. Fed up with the way they've all been treated, she's off to war against the reigning campus royalty.

programme.title: Two If By Sea
programme.desc: Petty thief Frank O'Brien steals a $4 million masterpiece painting. His cashier girlfriend of seven years, Roz, befriends the potential buyer of the painting, Evan Marsh, on an island. After being captured by FBI Agent O'Malley at the fish factory, she discovers Marsh is actually an art thief.

programme.title: It Could Happen To You
programme.desc: Much to the horror of his upwardly mobile wife, a New York City cop makes good on his promise to split his lottery winnings with a waitress in this delightful comedy. Money changes everything, and all three lives are transformed in this charming comedy.

programme.title: Hanging Up
programme.desc: A comedy/drama about a trio of sisters who are wildly different from one another and who deal with life, love, death and the telephone.

programme.title: Multiplicity
programme.desc: Far-out fantasy-comedy stars Michael Keaton as the ultimate split personality: a guy who clones himself in order to keep up with his busy schedule. Andie MacDowell also stars.

programme.title: The Animal
programme.desc: A bumbling police file clerk takes a walk on the wild side when a mad doctor repairs his body with animal parts.

programme.title: Death At A Funeral
programme.desc: A funeral ceremony turns into a debacle of misplaced cadavers and family secrets.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: While performing his comedy act, Jerry meets Keith Hernandez (as himself), the former New York Mets all-star and one of Jerry's favorite baseball players. But Jerry finds himself competing for his new pal's time with Elaine, who has caught Keith's eye. And shameless George will do anything to extend his unemployment benefits, including dating a bureaucrat's plain-looking daughter.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry agrees to make a side trip to visit a sickly fan -- who must live in a protective plastic tent -- while he and George drive up to a mountain cabin with their dates. But complications set in when Jerry gets lost while driving with Elaine, and a cigar-puffing Kramer makes an unwanted visit from out of the blue.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As he and Jerry start their script, George confronts Susan's father about the cabin fire.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: A simple night out turns into a nightmare when Jerry meets Elaine at the opera -- unaware that her new boyfriend is "Crazy Joe Davola," the maniac who's been stalking him and vowing revenge for some imagined slight.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: A procrastinating Jerry and George strain to think of an idea for a TV series just hours before meeting with impatient network honchos. But Jerry can't forget about his date with a beautiful young woman who confesses to him that she's still a virgin -- putting even more pressure on him.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry challenges George, Kramer and Elaine to pool their money in a contest of self-denial. Meanwhile, an excited Elaine looks forward to her date with hunky John Kennedy, Jr., and a guilt-ridden George gets an eyeful when he visits his whining mother in the hospital.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: On a flight home, Jerry parties in first class with a beautiful woman while Elaine suffers in a cramped coach seat next to a dead fat man. On the ground, George and Kramer scramble between airports trying to meet their friends -- until Kramer is chased onto a runway by police.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine is mortified when she accidentally reveals a bit too much d'colletage on her Christmas card, which she has sent out to everyone she knows. Meanwhile, Jerry tries to convince his skeptical new girlfriend, a model, that he practices good hygiene. Elsewhere, Kramer is asked to pose for a risqué underwear advertisement.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry takes pity on a poor foreigner whose important immigration papers were mistakenly left in his unopened mailbox. But the luckless man swears vengeance when he is hustled away for deportation back to his native country. Down the hall, a resourceful Kramer returns from his fantasy baseball camp after having punched out his idol, Mickey Mantle.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: A comedy of errors kicks in when Jerry is frustrated in his attempts to squeeze in two comedy appearances on opposite sides of town while shadowed by a pesky fellow comedian. Later, Jerry's bad timing continues when he has to rendezvous for a movie with George, Elaine and Kramer -- who are all in different orbits looking for seats as well as each other.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: When an eavesdropping college reporter mistakenly prints that Jerry and his pal George are intimate longtime companions, Jerry vainly works overtime to prove his straightness. And when the big-city newspapers pick up the story, Jerry has a lot of explaining to do to his overwrought parents.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry and George meet with a TV executive.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Good Samaritans Jerry, George and Elaine volunteer to comfort and assist senior citizens in their homes. Unfortunately, Jerry is assigned to a nasty old cuss -- who he loses on the streets thanks to Kramer's intrusion -- while George depresses an elderly man and Elaine has equally devastating problems as well.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine is adamant that the woman Jerry likes has implants. But when Elaine meets the woman in the sauna and trips and lands on her breasts, she isn't sure if they are implants after all.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry and George narrowly avoid a public stoning after George parks his father's car in a handicapped spot -- inciting an angry mob to trash the vehicle when a disabled woman is injured as a result of the illegal parking. And while George's unsuspecting father is mistakenly arrested for the interaction, George and Kramer shop for an electric wheelchair to give to the recuperating victim.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine's interest in an old boyfriend is rekindled when he loses weight.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: A valet's body odor haunts Jerry and Elaine; George discovers some surprising news about Susan.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.sub-title: I Want My Psycho Dad, Part 2
programme.desc: The "NO MA'AM" men take their Psycho Dad protest to Washington, D.C.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Bud's chance at a steady girlfriend is jeopardized by the hosts of a popular college radio show.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: In the 200th episode, clips of past episodes are shown.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: The cast discuss their favorite episodes which we see through clips.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Peggy forces Al to sacrifice a basketball game and spend a torturous evening in conversation with new neighbors, idealistic newlyweds Steve and Marcy Rhoades.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: At the suggestion of her next-door-neighbor Marcy, Peggy goes on a "thinergy" diet in hopes of rekindling the flame in Al.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.sub-title: Sixteen Years And What Do You Get?
programme.desc: Unbeknownst to Al, Peggy runs his credit card up to the limit and Al is forced to show up for his sixteenth wedding anniversary empty-handed.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.sub-title: But I Didn't Shoot The Deputy
programme.desc: Like any red-blooded American, when Al hears a strange sound in the night, he springs to the defense of his home and family and accidentally shoots the neighbor's dog.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.sub-title: Have You Driven A Ford Lately?
programme.desc: After Al and Steve restore a '65 Mustang to its former glory, Marcy and Steve can't resist giving it a test run - from the back seat.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: When Steve and Marcy decide to add on to their house, Al and Peggy have them squabbling over an exercise salon for the girls or a poolroom for the guys.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: When Peggy insists that Al attend her cousin's wedding, he protests and spends the evening in the bachelor pad of his swinging single co-worker, Luke Ventura.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: When Al refuses to buy Peggy a VCR, Marcy convinces her to get a job and buy one for herself.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: When Al and Peggy go away for a romantic weekend, Marcy and Steve volunteer to baby-sit for Kelly and Bud and discover that the Bundy children are unlike anything in the childrearing manuals.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Against his better judgement, Steve sits in on a Friday night poker game with Al and ends up losing his entire paycheck.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: When Gary, the jetset owner of the shoe store where Al works is in a near-fatal plane crash, Al decides that it's time to get some recognition from his boss or quit his job.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Marcy turns into a nervous wreck when an extremely seductive Al keeps popping up in her dreams.

programme.desc: A true story about a group of American teenage boys who crew a school sailing ship to gain experience, discipline, or whatever it is that their parents feel they lack.

programme.title: Kill Thy Neighbour
programme.desc: When Julie’s husband dies, she moves cross-country to rebuild her life with son Matty and build a closer relationship with her late husband’s sister, Alison. Yet Alison blames Julie for her brother’s death and has a plan to become Matty’s mother...no matter who gets hurt in the process.

programme.title: Father's Little Dividend
programme.desc: Shortly after coming to terms with his daughter's marriage, a father faces the prospect of becoming a grandfather.

programme.title: A Star is Born (1937)
programme.desc: Young Esther Victoria Blodgett arrives in Hollywood with big dreams of becoming a star. She manages to make it big with help from Norman Maine, a leading actor battling alcoholism, whose glory days are fading.

programme.title: Damage
programme.desc: An older politician begins an affair with his son's fiancée, leading to a series of devastating events.

programme.title: Deadly Dormitory
programme.desc: When a university student refuses to sleep with her professor in exchange for good grades, she's in danger of being killed to keep her quiet, and her mother must drop everything to save her.

programme.title: Zorro
programme.desc: In the New World, a new Spanish governor finds the province of Nueva Aragón under the iron fist of the corrupt Colonel Huerta and vows to bring justice under the guise of a masked avenger.
